# Async44 Recompact10 Spec12k Contract

## Async 44
async pre-rot compaction and swarm micro pressure default to 0.44 so background reclaim starts earlier

## Recompact 1.0
min recompact growth defaults to 1.0% so long sessions can reclaim again sooner after a compact

## Spec 1.2k
speculative pre-turn buffer defaults to 1.2k tokens for earlier preemptive compact without over-triggering
